title: [FIRRTL] Crash using an instance input ports to drive another instance
body:
Running the following test with `firtool test.fir`:
```
circuit Top:
  extmodule Other:
    input a: UInt<8>

  module Top:
    inst x of Other
    inst y of Other
    y.a <= x.a
    x.a <= y.a
```
It crashes in `LowerToHW`:
```
firtool: ../llvm/llvm/../mlir/include/mlir/IR/UseDefLists.h:190: void mlir::IRObjectWithUseList<OperandType>::replaceAllUsesWith(ValueT&&) [with ValueT = mlir::Value&; OperandType = mlir::OpOperand]: Assertion `(!newValue || this != OperandType::getUseList(newValue)) && "cannot RAUW a value with itself"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace.
```
```
#9 0x00000000004f3a3b llvm::DenseMapIterator<mlir::Value, circt::Backedge, llvm::DenseMapInfo<mlir::Value, void>, llvm::detail::DenseMapPair<mlir::Value, circt::Backedge>, false>::operator*() const /scratch/aryoung/circt/build-release/../llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/DenseMap.h:1236:5
#10 0x00000000004f3a3b llvm::DenseMapBase<llvm::SmallDenseMap<mlir::Value, circt::Backedge, 4u, llvm::DenseMapInfo<mlir::Value, void>, llvm::detail::DenseMapPair<mlir::Value, circt::Backedge>>, mlir::Value, circt::Backedge, llvm::DenseMapInfo<mlir::Value, void>, llvm::detail::DenseMapPair<mlir::Value, circt::Backedge>>::erase(llvm::DenseMapIterator<mlir::Value, circt::Backedge, llvm::DenseMapInfo<mlir::Value, void>, llvm::detail::DenseMapPair<mlir::Value, circt::Backedge>, false>) /scratch/aryoung/circt/build-release/../llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/DenseMap.h:316:27
#11 0x00000000004f3a3b (anonymous namespace)::FIRRTLLowering::setLowering(mlir::Value, mlir::Value) /scratch/aryoung/circt/lib/Conversion/FIRRTLToHW/LowerToHW.cpp:2054:22
#12 0x000000000050807b visitStmt /scratch/aryoung/circt/lib/Conversion/FIRRTLToHW/LowerToHW.cpp:3639:36
```
